name: Google Docs API
description: Google Docs API lets you create, read, and update Google Docs documents programmatically. Apply batch updates to insert, delete, and format text, tables, images, and other document elements.

capabilities.name: documents_create
capabilities.description: Create a new blank Google Docs document with the specified title.

capabilities.name: documents_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the latest version of a Google Docs document including all content, styling, and structure.

capabilities.name: documents_batchUpdate
capabilities.description: Apply one or more updates to a document atomically. Supports inserting text, deleting content, formatting, creating tables, adding images, and more.
